sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'w':
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b))
        print(f"  ({n['color']}): center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")

# Player is at right side, carrying blue square. 
# Let me try SPACE to place it near the blue bar
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
